headlines.title: Treasury Department authorizes Iranian oil sales through August
headlines.summary: Iranian supertankers have switched on their transponders, after going dark during the war, as they depart the Persian Gulf loaded with oil.

headlines.title: Alan Greenspan, former chairman of the Fed, dies at age 100
headlines.summary: Alan Greenspan presided over the Federal Reserve for 19 years under four presidents and mastered the art of obfuscation known as Fedspeak.

headlines.title: SpaceX signs computing power deal with open-source AI startup Reflection worth up to $6.3 billion
headlines.summary: SpaceX has turned its Colossus data center into a commercial computing power platform, landing recent deals with Anthropic, Google and Cursor.

headlines.title: Meta's WhatsApp head to step down, will be replaced by Indian fintech founder Kunal Shah
headlines.summary: Will Cathcart will step down as the head of WhatsApp and move into another role at the company. Kunal Shah will take over.

headlines.title: SpaceX stock falls 9%, pacing for third-straight day of losses after red-hot IPO start
headlines.summary: A rally following the company's record breaking IPO on June 12 has cooled, with stock dropping the past two full days of trading.

headlines.title: Who is Andy Burnham? And 4 other things investors should know as the U.K. replaces its prime minister
headlines.summary: Keir Starmer’s exit puts Andy Burnham, gilts, sterling and the next U.K. chancellor in focus for investors.

headlines.title: How to pick up some quick income using an auto stock hitting its stride
headlines.summary: With broader macro uncertainties driving pocketed volatility across the automotive sector, patient options traders have an exceptional set-up to harvest high-quality premiums.

headlines.title: Top Wall Street analysts like these 3 dividend stocks for solid returns
The average SpaceX buyer post-IPO is almost under water after two-day slide
headlines.summary: Shares of SpaceX fell as much as 7% Thursday to $178, leaving the stock trading roughly in line with its volume-weighted average price of just under $180.

headlines.title: Kalshi traders see greater than 50% odds the Fed will hike rates this year
headlines.summary: The Federal Reserve suggested higher rates could be in the cards, and traders on Kalshi see growing odds of a hike in 2026.

headlines.title: Why the oil may start flowing through the Strait of Hormuz faster than many believe
headlines.summary: Brian Sullivan's direct conversations with industry executives and experts based both here and in the Middle East indicate ships will start steaming.

headlines.title: CME CEO Terrence Duffy says the exchange operator will sue CFTC over perpetual futures
headlines.summary: Outgoing CME CEO Terrence Duffy said that the exchange operator will sue the CFTC over the agency’s decision to approve perpetual futures.

headlines.title: Alan Greenspan’s legacy as Fed chair: The ‘Greenspan put’ and a shift to overprotecting markets
headlines.summary: Greenspan, who died at age 100, opened the door to issues that still bedevil the Fed.

headlines.title: China’s growth engine has a weird new spark: buying ‘feelings’ to cope with a property crash
headlines.summary: Toy elves and robot police are exposing the bizarre true state of China’s fractured economy.

headlines.title: My houseguest left heat marks all over my table. I didn’t notice them until she was gone. Do I ask her to pay to remove them?
headlines.summary: “What drives me crazy is that she didn’t mention it.”

headlines.title: Big Tech has split into two artificial-intelligence camps — but the smart money isn’t chasing the next OpenAI
headlines.summary: Why tech giants such as Alphabet and Microsoft are the safer choice in the AI race.

headlines.title: SpaceX already needs to raise more cash, and its stock is falling 10%
headlines.summary: Elon Musk’s company is turning to the bond market less than two weeks after its blockbuster IPO.

headlines.title: U.S. oil prices fall below $74 a barrel on 60-day pause on Iranian oil sanctions
headlines.summary: Oil prices fall on hopes that more Iranian crude will hit the global market as supplies near critically low levels.

observations: High concentration in Communication Services sector, particularly in META, which poses a risk to portfolio diversification.
Cash allocation at 16.16% exceeds the minimum cash buffer requirement of 5%, indicating potential for better deployment into high-conviction opportunities.
suggested_changes: Trim META by ~6 share(s) to bring weight under 25%
Consider reallocating excess cash into sectors aligned with investor preferences, such as AI / compute infrastructure or cybersecurity.
open_questions: What are the current market conditions for sectors aligned with investor preferences?
Are there any high-conviction long-term setups available in the preferred themes?

candidates.thesis: NVIDIA is a leader in AI and compute infrastructure, benefiting from secular growth trends in AI, machine learning, and data center expansion. The stock is trading near its SMA50 and has a healthy RSI level, making it a strong candidate for long-term growth.

CrowdStrike is a leader in cybersecurity with strong growth prospects driven by increasing demand for cloud-based security solutions. The stock is trading near its SMA50 and has an attractive risk/reward profile.

BWX Technologies is a key player in small modular reactors and clean energy, aligning with the client's preference for clean energy themes. The stock is slightly above its SMA50 but remains below its 52-week high, offering a good entry point.

Marvell Technology is positioned to benefit from AI and compute infrastructure growth, particularly in data centers and 5G. The stock's RSI is healthy, and it's trading above its SMA50, indicating strong momentum.

Quanta Services is a leader in infrastructure solutions for renewable energy and electric grid modernization, aligning with the clean energy theme. The stock is trading near its SMA50 and has a favorable risk/reward setup.
